zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Venables於大約1385年出生在英國爾金德頓時，他的父親Richard de Venables21歲，母親Isabel de Langton23歲。他於1409年與Baroness Cecily Dutton在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1416年在他的家鄉享年32歲，埋葬在英國爾米德列維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Venables于大约1385年出生在英国爾金德頓时，他的父亲Richard de Venables21岁，母亲Isabel de Langton23岁。他于1409年与Baroness Cecily Dutton在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1416年在他的家乡享年32岁，埋葬在英国爾米德列維其。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Venables was born about 1385, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Venables, was 21 and his mother, Isabel de Langton, was 23. He married Baroness Cecily Dutton in 1409, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1416, in his hometown, at the age of 32, and was buried in Middlewich, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Venables est né environ 1385, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Venables, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Langton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Cecily Dutton en 1409, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1416, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Venables um 1385 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Venables 21 und seine Mutter Isabel de Langton 23. Er hat 1409 in Staffordshire, England Baroness Cecily Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1416 im Alter von 32 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Middlewich, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Venables è nato il circa 1385 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Venables, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Langton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Cecily Dutton nel 1409, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1416, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Middlewich, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Venablesが約1385年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Richard de Venablesは21歳，母Isabel de Langtonは23歳であった。1409年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでBaroness Cecily Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1416年に故郷で32歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Venables(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Venables(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Langton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1409년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Baroness Cecily Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1416년 그의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 미들루이치에 묻혔다.

mn.Kinderton, Middlewich, Cheshire, England: Kinderton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Venables nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Venables, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Langton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Cecily Dutton em 1409, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1416, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Venables родился около 1385 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Venables было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Langton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Cecily Dutton в 1409 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1416 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Venables nació aproximadamente 1385, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Venables, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel de Langton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Baroness Cecily Dutton en 1409, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1416, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
